name: Personio Developer API
description: REST API for Personio HR: employees, absences, payroll, recruiting events.

seo.title: Personio Developer API — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Personio Developer API: REST API for Personio HR: employees, absences, payroll, recruiting events.

when_to_use: HR data sync between Personio and payroll software
Employee absence data API for leave management tools
Recruiting event webhooks for ATS integrations
Automated employee onboarding via Personio REST API
People data export for custom HR reporting dashboards

cons: Rate limits feel tight for syncs
review.verdict: Reliable HR API if your company already runs Personio; pointless standalone given the product dependency.
review.best_for: European SMBs extending Personio HR to internal tools
review.not_for: Companies on Workday, BambooHR, or other HRIS

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

lock_in.reason: HR suite, data tied to Personio
